statements.select:
SELECT CODE CODE, DESCR TEXT FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM=#KEY_GROUP#
AND CODE <> #EXCLUDE_KEY_CODE#
ORDER BY $ORDER_BY$

SELECT isnull(MAX($FIELD_NAME$),0) FROM $TABLE_NAME$ WHERE 1=1
AND $FK_FIELD$ = #FK_VALUE#
AND $FK2_FIELD$ = #FK2_VALUE#
AND $FK3_FIELD$ = #FK3_VALUE#
SELECT convert(varchar,TPLANID) CODE,PLANNAME TEXT FROM KEY_PLAN ORDER BY TPLANID
SELECT 'Y' CODE, '是' TEXT UNION SELECT 'N' CODE, '否' TEXT
SELECT 'M' CODE, '男' TEXT UNION SELECT 'F' CODE, '女' TEXT

SELECT TOP 1 SEQNO,FUNID,C_TITLE,C_CONTENT1,C_VFILE1,C_PFILE1,C_CTRLITEM FROM dbo.TB_CONTENT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1 AND C_STATUS <> 'D' AND GETDATE() >=C_SDATE AND GETDATE() <=C_EDATE AND FUNID=#FUNID#
AND C_FUNCITEM=#C_FUNCITEM#
ORDER BY SEQNO DESC /*取最後建檔的*/

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,G.CODE1) CODE,G.TEXT FROM ( SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()) TEXT, DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()) CODE1 UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+1), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+1) UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+2), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+2) UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+3), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+3) UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+4), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+4) UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+5), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+5) UNION SELECT DATENAME(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+6), DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()+6) ) G ORDER BY G.CODE1
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR, CTID) AS CODE,CTNAME AS TEXT FROM ID_CITY ORDER BY CTID
SELECT TOP 1 CTNAME FROM ID_CITY WHERE CTID=#CTID#

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,ZIPCODE) AS CODE ,ZNAME AS TEXT FROM dbo.VIEW_ZIPNAME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1
AND CTID = #CTID#
ORDER BY ZIPCODE, ZNAME
SELECT ZIPNAME FROM ID_ZIP WHERE ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#
SELECT ZIPNAME FROM VIEW_ZIPNAME WHERE ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#
SELECT ZIPNAME AS CODE ,LNAME AS TEXT FROM dbo.VIEW_ZIPNAME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# ORDER BY ZIPCODE
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,CCID) AS CODE ,CCNAME AS TEXT FROM KEY_CLASSCATELOG WHERE CCID!='01' ORDER BY CCID
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS CODE ,CONCAT('(',JOBID,')',JOBNAME) AS TEXT FROM dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BUSID='G' AND TRAINID IS NULL ORDER BY CONVERT(int,JOBID)
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS CODE ,BUSNAME AS TEXT FROM KEY_TRAINTYPE WHERE LEVELS=0 AND TMID <6 ORDER BY 1
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS CODE ,JOBNAME AS TEXT FROM KEY_TRAINTYPE WHERE LEVELS=1 AND PARENT=#PARENT1# ORDER BY 1
SELECT BUSNAME FROM dbo.KEY_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE LEVELS=0 AND TMID <6 AND TMID=#TMID#
SELECT JOBNAME FROM dbo.KEY_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE LEVELS=1 AND TMID=#TMID#
SELECT JOBNO AS CODE ,concat('(',JOBNO,')',CJOBNAME2) AS TEXT FROM dbo.V_SHARECJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CYEARS='2019' ORDER BY JOBNO
SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS CODE ,JOBNAME AS TEXT FROM dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BUSID='H' AND TRAINID IS NULL ORDER BY CONVERT(int,JOBID)

SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS CODE ,TRAINNAME AS TEXT FROM dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BUSID='H' AND TRAINID IS NOT NULL AND JOBTMID=#JOBTMID# ORDER BY CONVERT(int,JOBID),CONVERT(int, TRAINID)
SELECT JOBNAME FROM dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BUSID='H' AND TRAINID IS NULL AND TMID=#TMID#
SELECT TRAINNAME FROM dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BUSID='H' AND TRAINID IS NOT NULL AND TMID=#TMID#

SELECT DISTINCT OO.COMIDNO AS CODE ,OO.ORGNAME AS TEXT FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO = CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID = CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO = CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.COMIDNO = OO.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID =CC.PLANID LEFT JOIN dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE = SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID = SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE = TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID = TIZ.CTID WHERE 1=1 AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN = 'N' AND ISNULL(CC.ISBUSINESS ,'N')='N' AND IP.YEARS >= YEAR(DATEADD (DAY,-30*6,CONVERT(DATE, GETDATE())))
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
AND UPPER(OO.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+ #SCHOOLNAME# + '%'
order by OO.ORGNAME COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS /*依名稱筆劃排序*/

SELECT ISNULL(COUNT(1),0) FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 SE2 WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 SY2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON SE2.ESETID = SY2.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SY2.OCID1=CC.OCID WHERE 1=1 AND SY2.OCID1 = #OCID# AND SY2.SIGNUPSTATUS != 2 AND CC.SENTERDATE <= GETDATE() /*2019-03-14 改成有到報名日的班，才有得算報名人數*/
SELECT Top 1 ORGNAME FROM ORG_ORGINFO WHERE COMIDNO=#COMIDNO#

SELECT TOP 1 SEQNO ,FUNID ,C_TITLE ,C_CONTENT1 ,C_VFILE1 ,C_PFILE1 ,C_CTRLITEM FROM TB_CONTENT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE C_STATUS <> 'D' /*2019-03-14 改判斷到時分秒*/ and GETDATE() >= C_SDATE and GETDATE() <= C_EDATE AND FUNID=#FUNID# ORDER BY C_UDATE DESC
SELECT ITEMVALUE FROM SYS_VAR WHERE SPAGE='system_msg' AND ITEMNAME=#ItemName# AND TPLANID=#TPlanID#
SELECT ITEMVALUE FROM SYS_VAR WHERE SPAGE='Config' AND ITEMNAME=#ItemName#
SELECT NAME AS TEXT ,DEGREEID AS CODE FROM KEY_DEGREE WHERE DEGREETYPE=1 ORDER BY SORT
SELECT NAME AS TEXT ,GRADID AS CODE FROM KEY_GRADSTATE ORDER BY GRADID

SELECT CAST(IDENTITYID as VARCHAR) AS CODE ,CASE WHEN IDENTITYID='02' THEN convert(NVARCHAR(30),'非自願離職者') WHEN IDENTITYID='04' THEN convert(NVARCHAR(30),'中高齡者(45歲至65歲)') ELSE NAME END AS TEXT /* ,NAME,[dbo].[FN_GET_MIDENTITYID2] (IDENTITYID),SORT28 */ FROM dbo.KEY_IDENTITY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1 AND [dbo].[FN_GET_MIDENTITYID2](IDENTITYID)!='99' /* AND IdentityID IN ('01','04','05','06','07','09','10','11','13','14','26','28','30','31','32','33','34','36','37','40','43') AND IdentityID IN ('01','04','05','06','07','09','10','11','13','14','26','28','30','31','32','33','36','37','40') ,'44' */ ORDER BY CODE
SELECT cast(SERVDEPTID as varchar) AS CODE ,SDNAME AS TEXT FROM KEY_SERVDEPT ORDER BY SERVDEPTID
SELECT cast(JOBTITLEID as varchar) AS CODE ,JTNAME AS TEXT FROM KEY_JOBTITLE ORDER BY JOBTITLEID
SELECT cast(TradeID as varchar) AS CODE ,'[' + TradeID + ']' + TradeName AS TEXT FROM Key_Trade ORDER BY TradeID
SELECT GETDATE()

WITH WComIDList AS ( /*Select 'x' IDNO, '各縣市政府辦理身障專班' CNAME Union All*/ SELECT CIDNO,CNAME FROM (VALUES ('x1',N'內政部營建署') ,('04191945',N'內政部中部辦公室（營建業務）') ,('52755393',N'內政部國土測繪中心') ,('27541255',N'經濟部工業局') /*EJOBW-1033-更改value*/ ,('69102402',N'經濟部智慧財產局（智慧財產培訓學院）') ,('23212200',N'經濟部商業司') ,('03722109',N'經濟部國貿局') ,('04179436',N'經濟部中小企業處') ,('58815101',N'文化部') ,('13535082',N'客家委員會') ,('33508909',N'交通部公路總局公路人員訓練所') ,('x2',N'行政院衛生署') ,('76766095',N'行政院環境保護署（訓練所）') ,('23124692',N'行政院農業委員會（輔導處）') ,('23165380',N'行政院經濟建設委員會') ,('83851414',N'行政院農業委員會漁業署') ,('20082444',N'行政院原住民族委員會') ,('PCC',N'行政院公共工程委員會') ,('52014146',N'衛生福利部國民健康署') /*EJOBW-1064-新增*/ ,('43669853',N'退輔會職訓中心') ,('40401902',N'宜蘭縣政府勞工處') ,('nt660660',N'南投縣政府') /*EJOBW-975-新增*/ ,('31009316',N'臺北市職能發展學院') ,('29329756',N'新北市政府職業訓練中心') ,('02370',N'新竹市政府') /*EJOBW-1697-新增*/ ,('92088214',N'高雄市政府勞工局訓練就業中心') ,('41384841',N'財團法人台灣金融研訓院') /* Union All Select '41384841', '財團法人台灣金融研訓院1' Union All Select '41384842', '財團法人台灣金融研訓院2' Union All Select '41384843', '財團法人台灣金融研訓院3' */ ,('80778299',N'財團法人國家實驗研究院國家高速網路與計算中心')/*EJOBW-1040-新增*/ ,('05076416',N'財團法人資訊工業策進會') ,('02750963',N'財團法人工業技術研究院') ,('15648033',N'財團法人國家實驗研究院') ,('11084792',N'財團法人中華顧問工程司') ,('17597502',N'財團法人台灣網路資訊中心1') ,('03702716',N'財團法人中華民國對外貿易發展協會1') ,('01013947',N'財團法人台灣博物館文教基金會') ,('14875622',N'財團法人台灣建築中心') ,('78322626',N'財團法人印刷工業技術研究中心') ,('01891206',N'財團法人紡織產業綜合研究所') ,('17602060',N'財團法人中央畜產會') ,('01030642',N'財團法人台灣手工業推廣中心') ,('01107297',N'財團法人中衛發展中心') ,('77217652',N'財團法人鞋類暨運動休閒科技研發中心')) AS ComIDList(CIDNO, CNAME) )
SELECT CIDNO CODE, CNAME TEXT from WComIDList
/*'['+CJOB_TYPE+']'+*/ SELECT CJOB_TYPE CODE ,CJOB_NAME TEXT FROM SHARE_CJOB WHERE CJOB_NO IS NULL AND CYEARS = '2016' ORDER BY CONVERT(numeric, CJOB_TYPE)
SELECT PURID CODE,PURNAME TEXT FROM KEY_PURPOSE ORDER BY PURID
SELECT UAGID CODE, UAGNAME TEXT FROM KEY_USAGEUNIT ORDER BY UAGID
SELECT dbo.FN_GET_DCLNO_20(RAND()) DCASENO_20
SELECT dbo.FN_GET_MASK3(#CNAME#) CNAME_MK
SELECT dbo.FN_GET_MASK1(#IDNO#) IDNO_MK
